selection_method: Fixed rubric: sum of 6 fixed scores (TOPIC_SCORING_FIELDS only, max 30). Highest total wins. No manual override.

candidate_1.editorial_interest_hypothesis: A default-but-overridable curfew invites debate about whether opt-out policies are meaningfully protective versus symbolic; the personal stakes (parents/teens/screen time) may give this strong relatability despite being a policy story.
